title: The Last Posse
writer: Seymour Bennett, Connie Lee, Kenneth Gamet
actors: Broderick Crawford, John Derek, Charles Bickford
plot: After a disgruntled rancher and his sons rob at gun-point a rival rancher, the town forms a posse to go after the culprits but the ensuing events are muddled by unclear facts, false testimony, old scores, secrets, murder and stole...
